title: Blockchain / Web3 Developer
description: Build decentralized applications and smart contracts on blockchain. From fundamentals to DeFi and security auditing, master the Web3 development stack.

nodes.title: Blockchain Fundamentals
nodes.description: How blockchain works — distributed ledger, consensus mechanisms, blocks, transactions, and decentralization.

nodes.title: Cryptography Basics
nodes.description: Public/private keys, hashing, digital signatures, and elliptic curve cryptography.

nodes.title: Ethereum Ecosystem
nodes.description: Ethereum architecture, EVM, gas, accounts, transactions, and the Ethereum Virtual Machine.

nodes.title: Solidity Programming
nodes.description: Write smart contracts with Solidity — data types, functions, modifiers, events, and inheritance.

nodes.title: Smart Contract Patterns
nodes.description: ERC-20 tokens, ERC-721 NFTs, ERC-1155, factory patterns, proxy patterns, and upgradeable contracts.

nodes.title: Development Tools
nodes.description: Hardhat, Foundry, Remix, Truffle — development frameworks for writing, testing, and deploying smart contracts.

nodes.title: Smart Contract Testing
nodes.description: Unit testing, integration testing, forked mainnet testing, and gas optimization with Hardhat/Foundry.

nodes.title: Smart Contract Security
nodes.description: Reentrancy, overflow, front-running, flash loan attacks, and security best practices for smart contracts.

nodes.title: DApp Frontend (ethers.js/web3.js)
nodes.description: Connect frontend to blockchain — ethers.js, web3.js, wallet connection, and reading/writing contract state.

nodes.title: DeFi Fundamentals
nodes.description: Decentralized exchanges, lending protocols, yield farming, liquidity pools, and AMM mechanisms.

nodes.title: NFTs & Digital Assets
nodes.description: NFT standards, metadata, marketplaces, royalty standards (ERC-2981), and on-chain vs off-chain storage.

nodes.title: DAOs & Governance
nodes.description: Decentralized autonomous organizations — governance tokens, voting mechanisms, and treasury management.

nodes.title: Layer 2 & Scaling
nodes.description: Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, rollups, state channels, and sidechains for scaling Ethereum.

nodes.title: Cross-Chain & Bridges
nodes.description: Cross-chain bridges, interoperability protocols, and multi-chain development.

nodes.title: Security Auditing
nodes.description: Formal verification, static analysis (Slither), manual review, and bug bounty programs.

nodes.title: Deployment & Verification
nodes.description: Deploy contracts to testnets and mainnets, verify source code, and manage contract lifecycle.

nodes.title: Decentralized Storage
nodes.description: IPFS, Arweave, Filecoin for decentralized file storage and data persistence.

nodes.title: Oracles (Chainlink)
nodes.description: Chainlink oracles — price feeds, VRF, and connecting smart contracts to real-world data.

nodes.title: Gas Optimization
nodes.description: Reduce gas costs — storage optimization, batch operations, and efficient data structures.

nodes.title: Ethereum Standards (EIPs)
nodes.description: Ethereum Improvement Proposals — understand the standards that define the Ethereum ecosystem.

nodes.title: Wallet Integration
nodes.description: MetaMask, WalletConnect, and wallet adapter patterns for DApp user authentication.

nodes.title: Testnets & Forking
nodes.description: Local development with forked mainnets, testnet deployment, and testing environments.

nodes.title: Alternative Chains
nodes.description: Solana, Cosmos, Polkadot — explore non-EVM ecosystems and their development paradigms.
